name: TrustRadius Reviews API
what_it_does: TrustRadius API for B2B software review platform with buyer intent signals. Enables access to verified product reviews, ratings, comparison data, and buyer intent data for software vendors. TrustRadius emphasizes review authenticity and provides intent data showing which software categories prospects are researching.
use_cases: Retrieving product reviews and ratings from competitive intelligence agents
Accessing buyer intent signals from ABM and demand generation agents
Monitoring review sentiment and volume trends from brand monitoring agents
Integrating TrustRadius review data into CRM and sales intelligence workflow agents
not_for: Consumer product reviews (TrustRadius is B2B software only)
best_when: A B2B software vendor using TrustRadius wants AI agents to monitor reviews, access buyer intent data, and integrate competitive intelligence into ABM and sales workflows.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Reviewer identity and intent data is personal data. Buyer intent signals from TrustRadius must be used per their data agreement. API access requires TrustRadius vendor agreement.

auth.notes: TrustRadius API access via vendor API key. Available to software vendors with TrustRadius vendor account. Contact TrustRadius for API access. Documentation is private.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Vendor account required; API as part of paid vendor features
pricing.paid_tiers: Software vendor plans including review collection and intent data
pricing.notes: B2B software vendor platform. Pricing includes review management and optional buyer intent data add-on.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per vendor API key

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Buyer intent signals reveal business purchasing behavior — handle per data agreement
No public MCP server — vendor API key required
API access requires active TrustRadius vendor account — not public
Intent data usage governed by TrustRadius DPA — verify permitted uses
Review data authenticity is TrustRadius's key differentiator — respect anti-manipulation policies
agent_readiness.security_notes: Reviewer PII and buyer intent data. GDPR, CCPA. Vendor-only API with DPA requirements.

security_score_components.security_notes: Reviewer PII and buyer intent data. GDPR, CCPA. Vendor-only API with data agreement.
